# Consecutive Elements

## Back-to-back Code Blocks

```javascript
const a = 1;
```
```python
b = 2
```
```rust
let c = 3;
```

## Back-to-back Blockquotes

> First quote

> Second quote

> Third quote

## Back-to-back Tables

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

| C | D |
|---|---|
| 3 | 4 |

| E | F |
|---|---|
| 5 | 6 |

## Back-to-back Lists

- List 1 item 1
- List 1 item 2

- List 2 item 1
- List 2 item 2

1. Ordered 1
2. Ordered 2

1. Another ordered 1
2. Another ordered 2

## Back-to-back Horizontal Rules

---

---

---

## Heading After Heading

### Heading 3

#### Heading 4

##### Heading 5

## Code Block After Heading

### Configuration

```json
{ "key": "value" }
```

### Script

```bash
echo "hello"
```
